title: stelis cochleata
intro: Stelis cochleata, commonly known as the helmet orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis cochleata include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds in the plant. The health benefits of Stelis cochleata include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and decongestant properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis cochleata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
